tagline: AI is coming to medical practice. Natural is not a prevention strategy. Trump DOJ reimburses misinformation. Leadership vacuum at NIH.

hero.title: Agentic AI Comes to Medicine
hero.author: Eric Topol, MD
hero.excerpt: Expansion of Capabilities With Two New Medical AI Models
hero.brief:
AI Doctors Outperform Physicians in Simulations
- MIRA hit 87.8% diagnostic accuracy vs. 78.1% for board-certified MDs across 500 ER cases.
- AIME matched PCPs overall; by visit 3, its plans rated 98% vs. 81%.

selected.title: Nature Is My Hobby, Not My Doctor
selected.author: Jess Steier, DrPH
selected.excerpt: You can trust the science and still be a little crunchy
selected.brief:
-MAHA is implicitly based on "Natural"=Good. Synthetic =Bad.
-Medicine and vaccines are considered synthetic
-This is simplistic and dangerous.
- Keep the garden. Keep the vaccine.

selected.title: Trump DOJ Settles Lawsuit By Vaccine Skeptic Despite Winning in Court
selected.author: Walker Bragman
selected.excerpt: Anti-mRNA vaccine writer Alex Berenson received a six-figure payout from the case.
selected.brief:
DOJ Pays Trump Allies After Winning Cases
- Berenson got $150K despite court dismissal.
- Expert calls settlements "clearly political," funded by taxpayers.

selected.title: Fact Check, Part 5: Continued Leadership Vacuum at NIH with the Continued Absence of Institute and Center Directors
selected.author: 27UNIHted
selected.excerpt: Bhattacharya fails to meet his promise to hire Leaders within the month
selected.brief:
NIH director vacancies:

13 of 27 NIH institutes still lack directors 3 months after Bhattacharya promised hiring "this month."
New NIEHS director is a JD Vance friend, not an environmental health expert.
No external review

selected.title: A New Path to Preventing Cancer
selected.author: Eric Topol, MD
selected.excerpt: A Landmark Study Showing the Way Forward
selected.brief:
-14-protein blood signature predicts lung cancer 5+ years before diagnosis.
-Validated across 8 cohorts, including never-smokers.
-IL-1β antibody cut risk in half in high-risk group.

selected.title: Virology Research is Not a Crime
selected.author: Angela Rasmussen, PhD
selected.excerpt: Free Vincent Munster and Claude Kwe
selected.brief:
Free Munster and Kwe:
NIH virologists Vincent Munster and Claude Kwe charged for paperwork on inactivated mpox samples.
DOJ's own evidence shows no pathogen, no smuggling.
A pretext to criminalize virology.

selected.title: The Storm Before the Storm: An Executive Order, Religious Exemptions, and More
selected.author: Jess Steier, DrPH
selected.excerpt: The State of U.S. Vaccine Policy | June 11, 2026
selected.brief:
Trump EO directs CDC/ACIP to realign childhood schedule to "peer countries."
ACOG issued its own pregnancy schedule, diverging from CDC.
Religious-exemption lawsuits advancing.

recent.title: Measles, bird flu, and Ebola are spreading. NIH just made its disease experts easier to fire.
recent.author: Celine Gounder, MD
recent.sourceName: What I can and Can't Say on TV
recent.excerpt: A June reclassification quietly stripped civil-service protections from the senior NIH staff who decide what infectious research gets funded, removing checks to catch politically motivated firings.
recent.brief:
NIH staff stripped of protections:

NIH senior staff who decide what research gets funded had civil service protections quietly stripped June 3.
Now "at will," no outside appeal.
Comes amid measles, Ebola, bird flu spread.

recent.title: The Probationary Project Pt. 3: Impacts to the American Public
recent.author: 27UNIHted
recent.excerpt: Read a breakdown of the impact of the probationary firings to the American Public

recent.title: The last hantavirus cruise passenger still locked down by Dr. Jay Bhattacharya and the CDC.
recent.author: Jeremy Faust, MD
recent.excerpt: The results of a hearing last week remain in limbo.
recent.brief:
Last hantavirus passenger held:

17 of 18 MV Hondius passengers have left the Nebraska quarantine unit.
Only Angela Perryman remains, held by a CDC order signed by Bhattacharya.
She's the one who spoke out first.

recent.title: The Baloney Protection Act
recent.author: Steven Novella, MD
recent.excerpt: We have had to endure a great deal of interference from government in the conduct of institutions that should be governed by science and evidence. I’m sorry to report – here is one more. Senators Mike Lee (R-UT) and Tommy Tuberville (R- AL) have recently introduced a bill that would limit the FDA’s ability to regulate
recent.brief:
- Sens. Lee and Tuberville filed a bill to block FDA regulation of homeopathy.
- Bill eliminates need for testing of efficacy or even ingredients 
- Snake Oil Legalization Act

recent.title: President Trump’s Childhood Vaccine Schedule
recent.author: Paul Offit, MD
recent.excerpt: Donald Trump recently issued two executive orders claiming that children in the United States are receiving too many vaccines.
recent.brief:
- Trump's EOs claim kids get too many vaccines today vs. 1980.
- Reality: smallpox vaccine alone had more immune components than all 17 today's vaccines combined.
- More vaccines = fewer deaths.
